items.headline: Council to discuss three lawsuits against Cupertino in closed session
items.summary: The council is scheduled to meet in closed session with legal counsel on pending litigation, including cases brought by Lixin (Leon) Chen and others, by Yes in My Backyard, and by the Garden Gate Coalition for Mary Avenue Safety, all filed in Santa Clara County Superior Court.

items.headline: City legalizes existing garage-to-ADU conversion under amnesty program
items.summary: A permit at 952 Harliss Av retroactively legalizes a detached garage that was already converted to an ADU, using the city's code amnesty process rather than authorizing new construction.

items.headline: Three ADUs permitted at one Lewis Road multi-family lot
items.summary: Two permits issued for detached ADUs at 458 Lewis Rd (#5 and #6), with #6 covering 2 units, adding three accessory units to a single multi-family property—more ADU density on one lot than typically seen in these filings.
